name: Cola-Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat dry the chicken. Salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place the chicken in the crockpot and arrange the onions on top.
3. Pour the cola and catsup over the chicken and onions.
4. Cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours.
5. When the chicken is cooked, remove it from the crockpot and place it in the refrigerator to cool.
6. Once cooled, skim off any fat that has risen to the surface.
7. Reheat the chicken before serving.
